_comment: Default model capability definitions. Sourced from Ollama docs and community (docs.ollama.com, ollama.com/search). Use when API capabilities are missing (e.g. uninstalled models, older Ollama).

api.description: Official capability strings returned by Ollama /api/show and /api/tags (Ollama 0.6.4+).

capability_descriptions.vision: Image understanding / multimodal; accepts images alongside text.
capability_descriptions.tools: Function calling / tool use; can invoke tools and use results in replies.

api.reasoning_note: Reasoning/thinking is not in Ollama's API yet; inferred from model name/family or catalog.

api_to_flags.description: Map API capability string (or alias) -> our dashboard flags. Used by _caps_from_ollama_api.

family_defaults.description: Model family or name-pattern defaults when API capabilities are absent. Keys are lowercase family/pattern hints; values are capability flags.
